pi_items.source: setup_task.sh: Python code line 58 sets file_path to this exact path
setup_task.sh: Python code line 37 sets n_rows = 51, creating 51 data rows
setup_task.sh: Python code lines 49-55 create DataFrame with these exact column names
setup_task.sh: Lines 71-73 write junk headers: 'St. Mary\'s Hospital - Virology Dept' (row 1), 'Report Date: 2025-05-12' (row 2); F1/F2 are default Excel columns from row 1 if imported
setup_task.sh line 11 and export_result.sh line 5 define ProjectDir and PrjPath
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh define DbPath to this SQLite database location

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetically generated Excel file (VirologyReport.xlsx) created with pandas and xlsxwriter containing 51 data rows. The file has junk header information in rows 1-3 ('St. Mary\'s Hospital - Virology Dept', 'Report Date: 2025-05-12', 'CONFIDENTIAL - DO NOT DISTRIBUTE'), with actual column headers ('SpecimenID', 'PatientID', 'CollectionDate', 'TestResult', 'CtValue') starting on row 4. The task requires importing this data into an Epi Info 7 SQLite database project named 'LabImport' with the correct 51 data records and proper column headers, avoiding the junk text from rows 1-3.
